system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         cellLimited Gauss linear 1;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,k)      Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,nuTilda) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

blocks

edges

boundary

        );

        faces

);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;

simulationType  RAS;

RAS
{

    printCoeffs     on;
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile

nu              1e-04;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

boundaryField

    }

        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    upperWall
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    {

}

    }

    {

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 2 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1e+05;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1e+05;
        p0              uniform 1e+05;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            totalPressure;
        value           uniform 1e+05;
        gamma           1.8;
        p0              uniform 1e+05;
    }

    upperWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    lowerWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.3;

deltaT          0.0001;

adjustTimeStep  yes;

maxCo           0.5;

maxDeltaT       0.0001;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.01;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|omega|nuTilda)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|omega|nuTilda)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    10;
    nCorrectors         3;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;

    residualControl
    {
        U               1e-4;
        p               1e-4;
    }
}

relaxationFactors
{
    fields
    {
        ".*"            0.95;
    }
    equations
    {
        ".*"            0.95;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>

<reviewer_analysis># Error Diagnosis and Resolution

## Current Error Analysis

Looking at the history of 7 failed attempts, the persistent issue is that the simulation either crashes/diverges or gets stuck in an infinite PIMPLE loop. The most recent attempt (Attempt 7) showed the simulation was running but not completing — stuck in PIMPLE iterations at nearly machine-zero residuals.

Now looking at the current error log, the situation has changed. The simulation is showing:

```
Courant Number mean: 0.281515 max: 0.500024
deltaT = 3.11286e-05
```

This is very interesting — the solver is **automatically adjusting deltaT** down to ~3.1e-05 despite `deltaT = 0.0001` being set in `controlDict`. The `adjustTimeStep yes` setting is overriding the user's specified time step. The Courant number is hovering right at the `maxCo 0.5` limit, confirming the simulation is marginal and sensitive.

The simulation is running but still not completing — it's deep in PIMPLE iterations. The residuals show `Ux ~1.6e-06`, `Uy ~7.6e-06` at iteration 3, improving to `~1e-06`/`~7e-06` at iteration 11, and getting close to machine precision by later iterations. Yet it never exits PIMPLE or reaches endTime.

## Root Cause

The simulation is fundamentally **too marginally stable** for the current settings. The combination of:
- Very small domain (millimeter scale)
- High velocity (15 m/s)
- Fine mesh (~0.001 mm cells → 1 micron resolution)
- kEpsilon turbulence model
- `deltaT` at the stability limit (CFL ~0.5)

...creates a stiff system where PIMPLE struggles to achieve convergence within reasonable outer iterations. The adaptive time stepping is reducing deltaT below the user's specified 0.0001, making things worse.

## Recommended Fixes (Different Approach from All Previous Attempts)

### 1. Disable `adjustTimeStep` in `controlDict`

The adaptive time stepping is counterproductive. Turn it off so deltaT stays fixed at the user-specified `0.0001`:

```
adjustTimeStep      no;
```

This prevents deltaT from drifting downward and keeps the simulation at the intended time step.

### 2. Reduce `nOuterCorrectors` significantly in `fvSolution`

Limit the maximum computational cost per time step:

```
nOuterCorrectors    5;
```

This caps the PIMPLE loop to just 5 outer iterations per time step, preventing runaway computation.

### 3. Increase relaxation factors substantially in `fvSolution`

To help the PIMPLE loop converge quickly to the exit condition:

```
relaxationFactors
{
    fields
    {
        ".*"            0.7;
    }
    equations
    {
        ".*"            0.7;
    }
}
```

### 4. Tighten the PIMPLE residual control tolerances in `fvSolution`

Make the convergence exit criterion stricter so it triggers properly:

```
residualControl
{
    U               1e-5;
    p               1e-5;
}
```

### 5. Add `maxDeltaT` constraint in `controlDict` as a safeguard

Even with `adjustTimeStep no`, add:

```
maxDeltaT           0.0001;
```

to ensure no accidental larger time steps creep in.

### Summary

The key change is **disabling `adjustTimeStep`** so the solver uses the user-specified `deltaT = 0.0001` consistently. Combined with limiting `nOuterCorrectors` to 5 and tightening the residual control to `1e-5`, the PIMPLE loop will either converge quickly or exit to the next time step, allowing the simulation to actually reach `endTime = 0.3` and terminate.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/controlDict', 'changes': 'Change adjustTimeStep from yes to no; Change maxCo from 0.5 to 0.3; Change maxDeltaT from 0.0001 to 0.0001 keep same'}, {'file': 'system/fvSolution', 'changes': 'Change nOuterCorrectors from 10 to 5; Change residualControl U from 1e-4 to 1e-5; Change residualControl p from 1e-4 to 1e-5; Change relaxationFactors fields .* from 0.95 to 0.7; Change relaxationFactors equations .* from 0.95 to 0.7'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a Reynolds-Averaged Simulation (RAS) pitzdaily simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm. The domain is a 2D millimeter-scale channel geometry. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 15m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls. Use timestep of 0.0001 and output every 0.01. Finaltime is 0.3. use nu value of 1e-04.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
